feedback.text: I'm not a huge fan of the payment processor duopoly (namely Mastercard and Visa) strong-arming various sites to delete certain games that they don't agree with. This is oppressive, they should have no say on how we spend our hard earned money. As of today they have forced Itch.io to remove all adult content, and Steam to remove problematic adult content. I don't take issue with removing problematic adult content, if addressed by the platform they are on. Payment processors should have no say.
